title: croton euryphyllus
intro: Croton euryphyllus, also known as the Croton or Fire Croton, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton euryphyllus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Croton euryphyllus include extracts, oils, and tinctures, which are used to create topical creams, ointments, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
